message:
fix(runtime): replace tokio::test(start_paused) with run_paused_async_test helper

The #[tokio::test(start_paused = true)] attribute was not compatible
with the runtime_compat abstraction layer. Extract run_paused_async_test()
that builds a paused CurrentThread runtime manually and block_on's the
future, matching the pattern used by run_async_test(). Convert
time_advance_moves_clock and time_advance_then_sleep_resolves tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
